data.requirement: Integrate CLTV (Customer Lifetime Value) with churn status to analyze relationships between customer value and churn behavior
data.reason: Corrects mischaracterization of CLTV as income proxy. Properly focuses on customer value retention analysis

data.requirement: Calculate churn rates by city clusters using Location_Data (city/population) with demographic attributes
data.reason: Original state-level analysis was redundant (all customers in California). Focuses on meaningful city-level variations

visualization.requirement: Linked scatter plots of CLTV vs tenure vs monthly charges with churn status color encoding (separate coordinated views)
visualization.reason: Scatter plot matrix unsuitable for 7,043 data points. Coordinated individual plots maintain readability while showing correlations

visualization.requirement: Bar chart showing churn rates by age brackets (binned 10-year intervals) with CLTV averages overlaid as line
visualization.reason: Line chart encoding was inappropriate for categorical age groups. Dual-axis chart better shows rate/value relationship
